evidence_contract.question: Can a reviewed fixed-design TT route evaluate the same tiny multistate likelihood and score target as CUT4 and a dense/refined reference?
evidence_contract.baseline_or_comparator: Current highdim nonlinear Zhao-Cui/fixed-design TT implementation in bayesfilter/highdim/filtering.py compared against P45-M1 route requirements.
evidence_contract.primary_promotion_criterion: Either implement and test a multistate/factorized fixed-design TT route, or record an executable blocker that prevents M2--M4 equality promotion.
veto_diagnostics: scalar-only state_dim == 1 route silently reused for state dimension 2
TT fit residual treated as likelihood correctness
gradients cross adaptive fitting branches without diagnostic-only labeling
dense reference absent for equality claim

commands.purpose: Run P45-M0/M1 focused governance and multistate-route blocker tests.
Compile the P45 phase gate and focused P45 tests.
commands.command: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=-1 MPLCONFIGDIR=/tmp python -m compileall -q scripts/p45_phase_gate.py tests/highdim/test_p45_target_registry.py tests/highdim/test_p45_multistate_zhaocui_route.py

commands.purpose: Check whitespace safety for the changed P45 M1 artifacts.

diagnostics.summary: M1 passes as a governed blocker: current nonlinear Zhao-Cui/fixed-design TT route remains scalar-only and cannot support multistate equality claims for M2--M4.

long_run_controls.resource_caps: No long run; CPU-only focused tests and artifact validation.
